channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: Democrats urge warnings to federal officials against insider bets on prediction markets
item.description: Members of the House and Senate asked the CFTC and federal ethics office to remind government employees it's illegal to make insider derivatives trades.

item.title: Microsoft Made GPT and Claude Work Together—And the Result Beats Every AI Research Tool Out There
item.description: Microsoft's Copilot Researcher now puts GPT and Claude to work in sequence—and the combination just outscored every AI system around.

item.title: Senators Reveal 'Mined in America' Bill to Boost Bitcoin Mining, Support Trump's Reserve
item.description: Sens. Bill Cassidy and Cynthia Lummis introduced legislation to support Bitcoin miners, arguing that the industry needs government help.

item.title: NFL asks prediction markets to act on ‘easily manipulated‘ bets
item.description: CFTC Chair Michael Selig signaled that the agency would defer to the football league in calling for changes to event contracts that could be manipulated by a single person.

item.title: Why Consensus is crypto’s new ground zero
item.description: A decade of building is paying off. Massive Institutional presence, deep focus on agentic commerce make the event in Miami one for the ages.

item.title: Chainlink Labs, Anchorage Digital Back New Crypto Super PAC Ahead of Midterms
item.description: The Blockchain Leadership Fund is a new hybrid PAC launched to support pro-crypto candidates in the 2026 midterm elections.

item.title: Hyperliquid whale opens $53M Bitcoin short: Should traders take notice?
item.description: A $53 million Bitcoin short position from a trader on Hyperliquid DEX could be a sign that pro traders expect BTC downside this week.

item.title: Fed's Powell's comments sooth bond market, but oil continues rise, hitting crypto and stocks
item.description: WTI crude oil closed above $100 per barrel for the first time since 2002.

item.title: Bitcoin Flashes 'Warning Sign' With Nearly Half of BTC Supply Sitting at a Loss: Report
item.description: Almost half of the Bitcoin supply is sitting at a loss, analysts said, as the top crypto asset remains about 47% off its all-time high.

item.title: Square rolls out Bitcoin payments at POS for eligible US merchants
item.description: Rolling out over the coming month, a Block executive said Bitcoin payments at point-of-sale will be automatically enabled and settled in US dollars by default.

item.title: Ethereum Foundation Stakes More ETH, Boosting Total to $50 Million
item.description: The Ethereum Foundation staked another $46 million ETH as part of its new treasury plan unveiled last year.

item.title: Qwen 3.5 Omni: Alibaba’s AI Model Can Now Hear, Watch, and Clone Your Voice
item.description: Qwen3.5-Omni, Alibaba's omnimodal AI, now handles voice cloning, 10-hour audio, real-time web search, and beats Gemini on audio benchmarks—all in one model.

item.title: Mitsubishi adopts JPMorgan blockchain for corporate payments
item.description: JPMorgan’s Kinexys network is gaining traction among corporations as blockchain-based payment rails scale toward $10 billion in daily transaction volume.

item.title: Chainlink and Anchorage Digital back launch of crypto-aligned PAC
item.description: Ahead of the November midterm elections, backers are lining up behind a new hybrid political action committee that allows contributions directly to candidates.

item.title: Jack Dorsey's Square Automatically Enables Bitcoin Payments for Millions of Sellers
item.description: Block-owned payment processor Square has shifted Bitcoin acceptance from opt-in to opt-out for eligible sellers.

item.title: Coinbase, Robinhood and Figure Stocks Are 60% Off Their Peaks—Bernstein Says Buy the Dip
item.description: Bernstein sees a buying opportunity in crypto stocks trading ~60% off their 2025 peaks, even as Q1 earnings look weak.

item.title: JUST IN: US Senators introduce the "Mined in America" bill to promote Bitcoin mining and codify President Trump's Strategic Bitcoin Reserve 🇺🇸 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTE9GVVpWSzVOb1BlblV6QzM0X2dEelRvYVY3bzFiLTVHQXRQdFRsYVdJVGU5dzI2SklDZXRVek54YkxHNGlHQzRqT1hVeDItRTdkbDRpYmIybzRWYU5uZVFmZk1tclpWRTQ?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: US Senators introd…

item.title: Bitcoin accumulation addresses absorb 67K BTC as miner-led selling falls: Data
item.description: Onchain data shows inflows to accumulation addresses topping 67,000 BTC, while total outflows from Bitcoin miners fell to levels not seen since 2024.

item.title: “I’m Confused About What Bitcoin Actually Is” — Ran Neuner Questions Crypto’s Core Narrative
item.description: In a Cointelegraph interview, Ran Neuner ponders Bitcoin’s identity crisis, market risks and the growing impact of macro trends.

item.title: Bluesky Users Revolt Against AI Tool Attie, Blocking It More Than ICE and White House Accounts
item.description: Bluesky's new AI tool Attie drew swift backlash from users wary of automation—a very different vibe than on Elon Musk's X.

item.title: Jack Dorsey’s Square auto-enables bitcoin payments for millions of U.S. businesses
item.description: The new rollout converts BTC to dollars by default for small businesses, aiming to embed bitcoin into everyday commerce without added friction.

item.title: Strategy pushes pause button on Bitcoin purchases, stock sales
item.description: For the first time in 13 weeks, the biggest public Bitcoin treasury company skipped a weekly purchase of the cryptocurrency without any word from Michael Saylor.

item.title: Ethereum Funds Shed $222 Million as Crypto Bill Fears Rattle Investors
item.description: Ethereum funds took the biggest hit as Clarity Act fears and macro headwinds pushed crypto outflows to $414 million for the week.

item.title: Nium launches stablecoin card issuance platform across Visa and Mastercard
item.description: The platform aims to help businesses issue stablecoin-funded cards is aimed at using digital dollar balances at the point of sale using existing card networks.

item.title: Trump-backed American Bitcoin hits 7,000 BTC as holdings expand rapidly
item.description: Satoshis per share climbs past 660, reinforcing rapid treasury expansion since Nasdaq debut.

item.title: Trump Brothers' American Bitcoin Hits BTC Milestone as Stock Falls to Lowest Price Since IPO
item.description: The Trump brothers' Bitcoin mining firm, American Bitcoin, now holds over 7,000 BTC—but shares are down 94% from the post-IPO peak.

item.title: Ethereum Foundation Backs 'Economic Zone' to Solve Fragmentation Issues
item.description: Gnosis and Zisk proposed a framework for aligning infrastructure within the Ethereum ecosystem, specifically layer-2 scaling networks.

item.title: BitGo expands Canton Coin services with trading, onchain settlement
item.description: BitGo broadens its Canton Coin offering beyond custody, reflecting efforts to build end-to-end infrastructure as tokenized assets move closer to real-world use cases.

item.title: XRP price charts flash bottom signals as bulls defend $1.30
item.description: Technical indicators hinted at a possible reversal in XRP’s price, as traders watch whether key support levels can hold.

item.title: JUST IN: 🇺🇸 Eric Trump's "American Bitcoin" now holds 7,000 BTC worth $475,000,000 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE5aUEhLVXdtZURfVm0yUnF3ZHllWnNVQ19fd0I3NHRrblQ1X0Jjb0RJLTJGTERDNVl5Y29BWmk1R3Y4elNuTUNOZ19lQzBuaGVaRDRDd210eERZeUVFV0ZaTzFn?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: 🇺🇸 Eric Trump's "Americ…

item.title: 7,000+ Bitcoin secured. #16 largest public Bitcoin treasury in the world. All achieved in under 7 months since our Nasdaq debut. 🔥 The accumulation machine is running at full throttle — mining at a discount + disciplined buying. No company is climbing the ran - x.com

item.title: Our plans to build a blockchain-based shared ledger have reached a major new milestone. After completing its design phase with a global group of banks, we are now shaping the ledger’s first MVP iteration, which will enable interoperability between banks’ to - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZkFVX3lxTE15cmwwSTRITXREcHBIcjFxU1JNQU5wRWRFeHJQSG9QTWNuT0tjSS1HbkNESlZ3MlM0U01GN09mbWVUc19fckRvYmFFRjJPcjVWZllzZWJxeVRHWU0wcUJBb0pzeXlQZw?oc=5" target="_blank">Our plans to build a blockch…

item.title: Bitcoin hashrate posts first-quarter drop for first time in 6 years as miners pivot to AI
item.description: The first-quarter decline breaks a long-standing growth trend, but could ultimately support decentralization as public U.S. miners face losing dominance.

item.title: From the Battlefield to the Blockchain: How Cryptocurrency Is Helping Finance the Drone Revolution
item.description: TL;DR Low-cost, commercially available drones have become central to modern conflict, allowing state and non-state actors, such as pro-Russia militias… The post From the Battlefield to the Blockchain: How Cryptocurrency Is Helping Finance …

item.title: The SEC’s latest crypto guidance still leaves too much unsaid
item.description: The regulatory agency’s reset is real, but the new details stop short of the full course correction the industry needs, say Gibson Dunn attorneys.

item.title: AI music needs blockchain infrastructure
item.description: AI music licensing breaks on remixes and ownership. Blockchains embed smart contract royalties and provenance, automating creator compensation at scale.

item.title: Midas raises $50M to build instant liquidity layer for tokenized yield
item.description: Tokenization startup Midas's Series A round was led by RRE and Creandum to scale an “instant liquidity layer” for onchain yield products.

item.title: Tom Lee's BitMine Adds More Ethereum as Strategy Takes a Break From Bitcoin Buying
item.description: BitMine continued its Ethereum accumulation, adding to its leading ETH treasury while Strategy took a week off from Bitcoin purchases.

item.title: Bitcoin analysis says $65K 'entry zone' with oil back above $100
item.description: Bitcoin continued to surprise some analysts as it held the lower end of its local range despite fresh Iran pressure on macro markets.

item.title: Bitmine makes biggest ether purchase in 2026 while other digital asset treasuries pull back
item.description: Tom Lee's Ethereum treasury bought more than 71,000 ETH over the past week, remaining the sole large corporate crypto buyer as Strategy broke its 13-week bitcoin purchase streak.

item.title: Bernstein says the 60% crash in crypto stocks is a rare chance to buy the dip at a 'big' discount
item.description: The broker said crypto equities trading at steep discounts are approaching a floor into weak first-quarter results, revising price targets on Coinbase, Robinhood and Figure.

item.title: Zcash upside hinges on repricing financial privacy in an AI-driven world, Grayscale says
item.description: The crypto asset manager argued rising surveillance and AI could elevate demand for private digital money, positioning Zcash as a mispriced bet on confidentiality.

item.title: We’re making it easier for millions of businesses to accept bitcoin. Starting today, eligible U.S. @Square sellers will begin having Bitcoin payments automatically enabled. Sellers who accept bitcoin will receive USD as default. This is how bitcoin as everyday m - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYEFVX3lxTFBqTGU2SERTSmJkcGVXRWpGZEg1QXdSTmc2bW9nRU1GcTNxdG5TanlhVUdLY0hLTk52RU9CdUN5Q3FjNWhyaDBWaUliTG9CWVlWdzNlZnRFR0FSal81YmNHdg?oc=5" target="_blank">We’re making it easier for millions …

item.title: Chainalysis Supports Tempo with Automatic Token Coverage
item.description: Chainalysis is excited to announce support for Tempo, an EVM-compatible Layer 1 blockchain purpose-built for stablecoin payments at scale. Tempo… The post Chainalysis Supports Tempo with Automatic Token Coverage appeared first on Chainalys…

item.title: Bitcoin hashrate falls after Iran conflict, HOOD down 16%: Month in charts
item.description: Yields for five-year US Treasury bonds are up 4%, putting a damper on Bitcoin price, which has ended the month much where it started.

item.title: Nearly half of all circulating bitcoin is underwater as long-term holders sell at a loss
item.description: Nearly half of all bitcoin is now trading at a loss, with the Bitcoin Impact Index surging to 57.4, indicating high stress levels.

item.title: Charles Hoskinson’s $200 million bet: Midnight goes live to tackle crypto’s biggest flaws
item.description: The Cardano founder argues crypto is too public, complex and risky for mainstream use and is backing a privacy-focused network to change that.

item.title: Aave V4 is now live on @ethereum. - x.com
item.description: Aave V4 is now live on @ethereum.

item.title: Bitcoin Dives as Trump Weighs US Ground Operation in Iran—But It's Rising Again
item.description: Bitcoin’s weekend drop coincides with Trump weighing ground operation in Iran, escalating geopolitical tensions amid month-end rebalancing.

item.title: Coinbase survey finds many crypto users still misunderstand taxes
item.description: A Coinbase and CoinTracker survey found fewer than half of crypto users correctly understand when digital assets become taxable.

item.title: Lido DAO proposes $20 million LDO buyback to boost price after 95% slide
item.description: A proposed treasury buyback of up to 10,000 stETH for LDO highlights how thin DeFi governance token liquidity has become, forcing the DAO to route through centralized exchanges.

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, NFTs, Web3 and crypto regulation.

item.title: CoinDesk 20 performance update: Ethereum (ETH) price rises 4.2% over weekend
item.description: Chainlink (LINK) joined Ethereum (ETH) as a top performer, up 4.1% since Friday.

item.title: How Hong Kong is turning tokenized bonds into real market infrastructure
item.description: Hong Kong plans to integrate tokenized bond issuance and settlement into its financial system, building scalable infrastructure for digital capital markets.

item.title: Trilitech broadens tokenized commodities push on Tezos with Metals.io
item.description: Trilitech launched a new platform for trading tokenized uranium and metals that are critical for the development of the artificial intelligence industry.

item.title: Aave rolls out v4 on Ethereum, aiming to expand DeFi into real-world credit markets
item.description: The upgrade has been in development for about two years and is designed to make it easier to use Aave for a wider range of lending and borrowing activities.

item.title: Aave V4 goes live on Ethereum after governance vote clears rollout
item.description: The rollout includes Aave Pro for advanced users and integrates Chainlink to provide oracle data for V4 markets.

item.title: Rate hike bets are building for the Fed – and now the Bank of Japan too
item.description: A weakening yen, rising bond yields, and the risk of a carry trade unwind pose a headwind to risk assets, including bitcoin.

item.title: Bitcoin rises as Trump says U.S. in talks with 'new regime' in Iran, threatens oil infrastructure if deal fails
item.description: Trump said "great progress" had been made toward ending the war, but warned the U.S. would "obliterate" Iran's power plants, oil wells and Kharg Island if a deal isn't reached shortly.

item.title: 7,000+ BTC and still climbing. Since our Nasdaq debut: ~3x growth in Bitcoin Reserve >2x growth in Satoshis per Share Currently ranked #16 globally among publicly-traded Bitcoin companies This is just the beginning. @ABTC - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiWEFVX3lxTFAwZHVsOGJIcklEM2tUYTV6cW9ZSEJ5T0lUQmVyNzh1bnlRWmQybTg3bDdSc0g4dkExU0ZXTm9sQzVsejhjV2luTnJJUkt6MDllS2RON3lMZV8?oc=5" target="_blank">7,000+ BTC and still climbing. Since our Nasdaq…
